text:
Created attachment 225323
i386-wine-devel-6.9.diff

Hello,

an update to 6.9

Changes:

 - WPCAP library converted to PE.
 - Support for paper forms in the print spooler.
 - More math functions from Musl in the C runtime.
 - Various bug fixes.

Thank you in advance.
